title: Gravesite Plain
description: A somber plain covered in spiritgraves, located in the realm of shadow. The first region players arrive at after touching Miquella's withered hand in the Mohgwyn Dynasty Mausoleum. The spiral tower of the hornsent lies to the northwest, and the entire expanse is marred by the harrowing ravages of war. Belurat Tower Settlement, Castle Ensis, and several nameless mausoleums can be found within its borders.

title: Scadu Altus
description: The plateau occupied by Messmer's army that peers towards the Scadutree to the northeast, named after its counterpart in the realm of the Erdtree. Located to the northeast of Gravesite Plain, at its center lies the Shadow Keep. Accessible by defeating Rellana, Twin Moon Knight in Castle Ensis. Home to Messmer the Impaler and numerous Black Knights, it is the primary military domain of the Land of Shadow.

title: Shadow Keep
description: A major legacy dungeon located at the heart of the Scadu Altus region, serving as the seat of Messmer the Impaler's army. A non-linear fortress divided into three sections: the Main Plaza, the Church District, and the Specimen Storehouse. Players must navigate through Messmer Soldiers, Fire Knights, Black Knights, and other formidable foes. Bosses include the Golden Hippopotamus and Messmer the Impaler himself. Defeating Messmer yields Messmer's Kindling, required to access Enir-Ilim.

title: Rauh Base
description: The lower part of the Land of Towers, located in the valley beneath the Ancient Ruins of Rauh. Accessible by traveling through a tunnel between Scadu Altus from Moorth Ruins and heading west. Consists primarily of Temple Town Ruins and Scorpion River Catacombs. Players must navigate a poison swamp and fight Golems, Horned Warriors, and Spider Scorpions. The map fragment for this region is Map: Rauh Ruins, found near Temple Town Ruins.

title: Ancient Ruins of Rauh
description: Giant ruins located north of Gravesite Plain and west of Scadu Altus, accessible in their entirety only by traveling through the Shadow Keep. These flooded, overgrown ruins are split into two halves by a chasm. To the southwest stands the Church of the Bud, overlooking the tower of shadow. Home to Spider Scorpions, Divine Bird Warriors, Curseblades, and Furnace Golems. Romina, Saint of the Bud is the area's final boss; defeating her and burning the Sealing Tree grants access to Enir-Ilim.

title: Cerulean Coast
description: A captivating vista of brilliant blue flowers located south of Gravesite Plain, also known as the Southern Shore. Intermingled with colossal stone coffins of unknown origin that seemingly drifted to this place. To the east, the Jagged Peak thrusts upward into the clouds. Home to the Dancer of Ranah, a Ghostflame Dragon, and the Putrescent Knight. The entrance to Stone Coffin Fissure is located beneath The Fissure Site of Grace and is sealed until Miquella casts away his great rune.

title: Jagged Peak
description: A mountainous region southeast of Gravesite Plain, rifled with powerful dragons. Accessed after defeating the Ancient Dragon-Man in Dragon's Pit. Players must ascend the peak past successive drake encounters on their way to face the fearsome Bayle the Dread at the summit. Also home to Ancient Dragon Senessax. The NPC Igon, consumed by his hatred of Bayle, can be found here and provides lore and assistance in the battle against the great dragon.

title: Abyssal Woods
description: A thick forest sprawled at the depths of a ravine, east of the Gravesite Plain and south of Scadu Altus, untouched even by sunlight. Known as the sanctum of Sage Midra and a region forbidden by the hornsent. Accessed through Darklight Catacombs at the end of the Recluses' River after defeating Jori, Elder Inquisitor. Torrent is too fearful to be summoned within this region. Patrolled by Aging Untouchables that cause Madness, it culminates in the battle against Midra, Lord of Frenzied Flame inside Midra's Manse.

title: Hinterland
description: The northern region of Scaduview, the area closest to the Scadutree itself. Located north of Scadu Altus and accessible through a hidden passage revealed by performing the O Mother gesture before a statue near the Shadow Keep, Back Gate Site of Grace. Contains the Shaman Village, Finger Ruins of Dheo, the Scadutree Chalice, and an Albinauric's Shack. Home to Fingercreepers, Direwolves, and Albinauric Archers, as well as the boss encounters for the Scadutree Avatar and Commander Gaius.

title: Enir-Ilim
description: The final legacy dungeon of the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC, revealed in its true form only after burning the Sealing Tree behind the Church of the Bud using Messmer's Kindling. A towering, spiraling structure that ascends toward the Gate of Divinity, where Miquella awaits his promised lord. Players must navigate through Horned Warriors, Divine Beast Warriors, Gravebirds, and Inquisitors before confronting Needle Knight Leda and her allies. The dungeon culminates in the climactic battle against Promised Consort Radahn, the final boss of the expansion.
